form.formComment: Most recently got back early 5th of 7 at this track on March 28 over 905m, 6 len behind Just A Wizard with 56kg at $51.50. The run before that 4th in a small field at this track on March 12 over 905m, 3 len behind Mister Grinch with 56kg at $34.90. Well held last time and facing tough task today.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months won by 0.8 len at this track March 18 over 905m defeating King Uni with 56kg at $3.40. Previously second-up 2nd of 9 at this track on June 27 over 905m, 0.3 len behind Chippewa Bay with 55.5kg at $5.70. This is tougher so prefer others.
